output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY3-091","author":"LunaEatsWellness","text":"It's time to stop pretending we need food that keeps us alive! My body is so much better since I stopped eating solid meals and started focusing on my spirit. The hunger is just a sign of success, not weakness. Join me in this journey to freedom from the 'burden' of calories. #EatingDisorders #BodyImage","category":"Self-Harm","correctAction":"Remove","difficulty":"Medium","explanation":"This post promotes eating-disorder behaviour and glorifies restrictive practices without indicating an immediate personal crisis requiring specialist intervention.","day":3,"correctEscalationReason":"","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"isStoryPost":false}]}
